mechanism_narrative: Sustained growth in industrial production reflects robust manufacturing activity, which boosts corporate earnings and signals expansion, leading to positive equity returns.
failure_condition: Rank IC of INDPRO MoM change vs 20-day forward returns is negative or not statistically significant over any 3-year rolling walk-forward window.

mechanism_narrative: An unemployment rate rising above a key threshold signals weakening labor markets and rising recession risk, which depresses investor sentiment and equity valuations.
failure_condition: If UNRATE triggers above 4.0% are followed by positive 20-day returns more than 60% of the time over a 5-year window, hypothesis is falsified.

mechanism_narrative: Negative real interest rates combined with accelerating inflation erode real returns and force expectations of future tightening, leading to negative equity returns over the medium term.
failure_condition: If triggered instances yield positive 60-day forward returns in more than 40% of cases over a 5-year rolling window, hypothesis rejected.

mechanism_narrative: During periods of strong GDP growth, a sharp rise in housing starts confirms sustained residential demand, reinforcing economic momentum and pushing equity prices higher.
candidate_trigger: GDPC1 YoY growth > 2.5% and HOUST MoM > 3%
failure_condition: If triggered instances do not produce significantly positive mean 20-day returns (t-test p > 0.05) or positive in less than 60% of cases over 5 years, hypothesis falsified.

mechanism_narrative: A monthly decline in retail sales signals weakening consumer spending, a key driver of economic growth, which leads to negative equity market reactions.
failure_condition: If months with negative RSAFS MoM are followed by positive 20-day returns in more than 50% of cases over a 5-year window, hypothesis rejected.

mechanism_narrative: Slowing payroll growth combined with rising interest rates indicates potential stagflation, where weak employment meets tightening monetary policy, depressing equity valuations.
failure_condition: If triggered instances produce positive 60-day returns in more than 40% of cases over any 3-year rolling window, hypothesis falsified.

mechanism_narrative: In an accommodative monetary policy regime (real rates negative), a surge in industrial production suggests overheating that may prompt abrupt tightening, causing short-term negative equity returns.
regime_hint: accommodative monetary policy with supply-side tightness
failure_condition: If triggered instances do not show significantly negative mean 5-day returns (t-test p < 0.10) or positive in more than 50% of cases over a 3-year walk-forward, hypothesis rejected.

mechanism_narrative: A sustained decline in housing starts over three months is a leading indicator of economic deceleration, flagging reduced residential investment and consumer wealth, which weighs on equity prices.
failure_condition: If triggered declines are not followed by negative 60-day forward returns in at least 60% of instances over a 10-year period, hypothesis falsified.
